taxonomy: Acinodendron ovalifolium is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. This plant is native to South America and is also known as a member of the tribe Merianieae. The classification of Acinodendron ovalifolium places it within the subfamily Merianoideae. The genus Acinodendron is a member of the family Melastomataceae, which consists of approximately 1,000 species. The plant is further classified as a member of the kingdom Plantae.
